function.name: get_file_modified_time
function.description: Get the modification time of a file.
function.long_description: Returns the file modification timestamp and formatted datetime details.
example_user_queries: Show the last modified time for ./capabilities/travel/get_flight_status.json.
Tell me the modified time for ./capabilities/stock/get_dividend_info.json.
Check the last modified date of ./capabilities/time_operations/get_timestamp.json.
What is the modification time of ./capabilities/health/calculate_bmi.json?
Find the last update time for ./capabilities/file_metadata/get_file_permissions.json.
Give me the modified timestamp of ./capabilities/maths/length_converter.json.
